defectsFixed.description: VITE_API_URL not set in GitHub Actions - frontend build missing backend URL

changes: Added env.VITE_API_URL: https://nox-dashboard-backend-production.up.railway.app
Set at build step so frontend knows backend endpoint

defectsFixed.verification: GitHub Actions YAML valid, env var injected during build

defectsFixed.description: Conflicting Railway configs - both railway.toml and railway.json existed

changes: DELETED railway.toml from project root
DELETED backend/railway.json (redundant)
Created new railway.json in project root with proper settings

defectsFixed.verification: Only railway.json exists in root, railway.toml removed

defectsFixed.description: GitHub Actions only deploys frontend - no backend deployment docs

changes: Added detailed comment block explaining backend deployment
Documented manual Railway CLI deployment steps
Clarified that frontend/backend deploy separately

defectsFixed.verification: Comments visible in workflow file, deployment steps documented

defectsFixed.description: Procfile in wrong location - was in backend/ instead of root

changes: DELETED backend/Procfile
Created new Procfile in project root
Updated command: cd backend && npm start

defectsFixed.verification: Procfile exists in project root, backend/Procfile removed

defectsFixed.description: Health check timeout too short - default 100s insufficient

changes: Increased healthcheckTimeout from default to 300 seconds

defectsFixed.description: Missing Node engine spec in frontend/package.json

changes: Added engines.node: '>=18.0.0'
